action.reasoning: Observation: The data exploration showed we have 10,415 training pairs and 1,157 validation pairs of clean and noisy audio files. There was an error loading audio files due to missing torchcodec. Analysis: I need to install torchcodec to handle audio loading properly. Decision: Install torchcodec first, then create a basic model and training script.
